since_last: 81% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.92%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 81% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.69% · BTC -0.20% · Gold +1.08% · Nasdaq100 +1.65%. 81% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.92%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.92%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.39%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +10.32%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +10.32%, AMD +8.96%, ANET +8.54%, INOD +7.80%, VRT +7.74%. Laggards: AVAV -4.66%, INTU -2.66%, HON -2.08%, SAP -1.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.66% at $160.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
